name: RESERVE PETROLEUM CO
business: RESERVE PETROLEUM CO is engaged principally in managing its owned mineral properties and the exploration for and development of oil and natural gas properties. It sells oil and gas production and earns revenue from royalty interests. It also had a water well drilling subsidiary whose contract was terminated in April 2024.
sellsTo: oil and gas purchasers under short-term sales contracts based on spot market prices

exposures.sentence: The Reserve Petroleum Company (the Company, we, our or us) is engaged principally in managing its owned mineral properties and the exploration for and the development of oil and natural gas properties.
